item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have to. Tuesday RANDOM MEME dump
item.description:
1. VILLAIN ORIGIN STORY
2. I imagine parenting this kid would be totally normal and not ear destroying
3. "Well... the cement is in the walls, I guess. Job done."
4. Who else is like that?
5. This guy to himself: "Heh"
6
7. Like exactly right now...
8. Defense: +100
9
10.1 Now that's a great prank
11.2
12.1 "READ!"
13.2
14. When God misclicks
15. [OC] Here is some jokes from my own game - a Stanley Parable-inspired game, where you annoy The Narrator as much as you want. If you licked the humor in this dump, you might lick the game. Please support us by hitting the WISHLIST button on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have an awesome Tuesday!

that's a nice joutfit.. greetings online friends
makes more sense if you've seen the movie Creepshow
again
crab bread.. why didn't i think of that?
still on board
bulldog?
you didn't have to yell
looks like more than one egg
there goes my weekend plans
mmm hmm
we've all done this
dang
wholesome
it's a building
looks good just need that tv a little more elevated
crabs always go for busch light
as is tradition
that's my time... have a great night gang!!

item.dc:creator: Necridos

item.title: My day yesterday did not go like I expected
item.description:
I've been helping a friend build a shed, and got there early yesterday, so I decided to check some things before going inside. While checking the level of the wall, this little guy walked right in front of me, between me and the wall I was checking. I started recording this video, to capture the moment for my friend, but stopped after the possum circled back around toward me. He hadn't seemed bothered by my presence, which was weird, and that was on top of a possum being out at almost 11am.
I picked him up, and he made no effort to protest. Within about a minute, he was asleep on my chest.
My friend keeps small animals, so set up one of her spare containers she uses for them, until we could find a rescue to take him in. FYI, possums sleep a lot like cats.
More sleepy possum.
Another angle of the sleepy possum.
Video of a sleeping possum. My friend and her husband took him to an animal rescue we found about 6 hours after I first saw him. They said the wound on his head was likely a cat bite, and that it was causing a pretty serious infection. That was why this young, but living independently, possum was so docile, and out during the day; delirious from sickness. The rescue is going to clean his wound, and give him a strong course of antibiotics. When he's well, he's going to be released near a local mountain, on 88 acres that are owned by another animal rescuer.
item.dc:creator: sciron

item.title: Background either love story or blackmail
item.description: No hating. I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: 565 Days and $40,000 later
item.description: This was an insanely longer process than originally anticipated. Doing it part time caused so many more issues than expected. But I've learned so many lessons (at great cost) that I'm hopeful my next steps toward the airline won't take nearly as long. Just such a mixture of joy and relief to finally have something to show for my efforts. Now to go try and earn enough money to throw at an instrument rating! Remember, your success doesn't always go the same speed as everyone else. It doesn't mean you won't make it in the end.
item.dc:creator: WaxDragon
